title: Start to Finish Layout Using Rise & Shine for Simon Says Stamp
excerpt: Thank you for the wonderful feedback about the videos we have been doing. It takes a lot of time and work to put them together, so it's nice to know they are being well received. It's sometimes so much better…
body:
Thank you for the wonderful feedback about the videos we have been doing. It takes a lot of time and work to put them together, so it's nice to know they are being well received. It's sometimes so much better to be able to demonstrate the process and give the thoughts behind certain decisions via a video as opposed to simply photos. There is a lot of fun stuff in store including a brand new and exciting project we are launching next week! Be sure to subscribe to my YouTube channel if you haven't already.

Simon Says Stamp asked me to make something to celebrate the arrival of Rise & Shine products. I wanted to also use some items from Stitched to make sure you all know you can always mix in from your stash and other collections. Enjoy!
